title: Transit Blue — Original Nocturnal Focus Music
prompt: Instrumental only. Ten minutes of restrained nocturnal electronic focus music in C sharp minor around 96 BPM: rounded analog bass, a soft muted drum machine, warm electric piano chords, sparse glassy synth texture, and deep dark ambience. A quiet arrival, a stable forward pulse, small chord-color changes across broad chapters, one restrained harmonic widening, and a gradual calm release. Low-to-medium energy for focused work. No vocals, no recognizable melody, no EDM drop, no aggressive snare, no busy hi-hats, no bright lead, no dramatic climax.
